ideation: This animation sequence will depict a family embracing.  The movement will start with arms slightly out to the sides, then move to a hug, and then return to a relaxed but close position.  The focus is on conveying warmth and togetherness.  Since the robot has no elbows, the hug will be shown as a close approximation of arms around each other, focusing on the overall embracing posture rather than precise hand placement. The arms will move in a coordinated fashion, mirroring each other's movements.

frames.beat: arms open slightly, ready for embrace
both arms swing inward, a warm family hug
arms settle close, togetherness and warmth
